name: Crixus BH3 Acquisition Company Units
summary: Crixus BH3 Acquisition Company Units represent a bundled offering typically including a share of common stock and a fraction of a warrant in Crixus BH3 Acquisition Company, a SPAC. These units are offered during the company's initial public offering (IPO) and can later be separated into their component parts. The company is based in Miami, Florida.
